productDisplayName: Just Natural Unisex Black and Grey Reversible Rain Jacket
description: Style noteLightweight and compact when not in use this waterproof jacket from just natural is ideal for rainy days. Elastication at the hood, sleeve and bottom hem block water completely. Its reversible nature is an added bonus and multiple pockets inside and out, help keep your monetary essentials dry.Product DetailsGrey and black reversible rainwear jacket, detachable zipper and Velcro closure in front, two welt pockets with Velcro closures in front,  black panels near front and back side seams with tabs to adjust the Fit, raglan full sleeve with panels and print, elasticated sleeve hem with Velcro to adjust fit, paneled hood with clasp for rolling it away when not needed, adjustable and elasticated bottom and hood hemWhen reversed- yoke with red corded piping detail, print on left sleeve and zippered welt pockets in frontMaterial and carePolyesterMachine wash coldDo not iron Size and FitThe model (height 5'8"and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
